provider: HKUST 2025/26 BEng in Microelectronics and Integrated Circuits Major Requirements
note: This cohort-specific supplement binds every explicitly coded 2025-26 Major Requirement to the current BEng in Microelectronics and Integrated Circuits Major. It preserves the Engineering Fundamental alternatives, the two official 9-credit capstone paths, and the complete 16-course ELEC elective list requiring at least 13 credits with at least two 4000-level courses. Students may graduate without the Research Option. The Research Option additionally requires ELEC 5900, use of ELEC 4901 for the capstone requirement, and at least 6 advisor-approved advanced elective credits consisting of at least one UROP course taken before the thesis and one unspecified PG-level course. The five published UROP codes are recorded, but no PG course is invented and the Option therefore still requires manual official confirmation. No Year or semester is inferred because the Major Requirements PDF does not assign coded pathway placements. University Common Core, English, Legal Education, and additional electives used to reach 120 credits remain outside this Programme-local supplement.
